Nux-m..personality: A dazed, automatic individual who goes through daily routines as if in a dream state, performing duties mechanically without full conscious awareness. Predominantly seen in nervous, hysterical women who are lean and have lost flesh, with extreme sensitivity to environmental conditions such as wind, cold, and dampness.
Nux-m..mental_state: Profound loss of memory and dreamlike consciousness are the keynotes; she speaks intelligently in the moment but retains nothing of the past and forgets what she has been doing if interrupted. There is a tendency toward clairvoyance and prophetic speech, combined with an overwhelming, irresistible sleepiness that makes her fall asleep on all occasions. When aroused she looks dazed and confused, answering questions slowly or irrelevantly.
Nux-m..emotional_pattern: Deeply susceptible to emotional shock — blighted affections, loss of a friend, or fright can trigger the characteristic dazed and dissociated state. She is prone to hysteria, faintness, and momentary paralysis of a functional nature, reflecting a nervous system that withdraws into numbness and disconnection rather than expressing distress outwardly.
